title: Nilgirianthus beddomei
taxonomy: Nilgirianthus beddomei is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to the Western Ghats region of India. The classification of Nilgirianthus beddomei is within the genus Nilgirianthus, which is part of the family Acanthaceae. The species was described by Joseph Dalton Hooker in 1893. Further classification details may include its rank within the kingdom, phylum, and class of plant taxonomy.
